backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining expense and user profile types, CRUD operations (add/get/delete expenses, save/get profiles), and access-control guards using a MixinAuthorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that resets all persistent state (expenses, nextId, userProfiles) to empty defaults on each upgrade, effectively discarding old data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for the infinite 'Loading your profile...' spinner, linking it to App.tsx and useQueries.ts with a high-confidence rating.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's role and recent changes in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point applying Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with mobile/PWA meta tags, an amber theme color, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, profile setup modal, and tab-based navigation (Add Expense, History, Repay Report), with timeout/error fallback to prevent infinite loading.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header component showing the app logo, title, INR badge, and a login/logout button wired to Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom tab bar with three tabs (Add Expense, History, Repay Report), active indicator styling, and safe-area inset support.
frontend/src/components/CategoryBadge.ts: Displays a color-coded pill badge for an expense category, using getCategoryKind to resolve the discriminated-union Category type to label, icon, and CSS class.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching/saving user profiles, querying expenses by date/range, and mutating expenses (add, delete, update).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, category badge utility classes, and celebration animation keyframes.
frontend/src/lib/categoryUtils.ts: Utility module providing category metadata (labels, icons, badge classes, subcategories) and helper functions to build, inspect, and format expense Category discriminated union values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddExpense.tsx: Page component for adding a new expense with category/subcategory selection, amount, note, and date inputs, plus a celebration overlay animation triggered for large expense amounts.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Expense history page with filter modes (all/date/range), category chip filters, sorted expense list with delete support, category totals, and high-spend highlighting.
frontend/src/pages/RepayReport.tsx: Displays a report of 'Repay' cash transfer expenses grouped by person name, showing per-person totals and a grand total of outstanding repayments.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Nunito/Poppins), OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the expense tracker app's features, architecture (localStorage-based, mobile-first), known issues, and existing feature inventory at version 13.
